# services.minidlna

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.minidlna`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.minidlna.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable MiniDLNA, a simple DLNA server. Consider adding `openFirewall = true` into your config. |
| `services.minidlna.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to enable opening HTTP (TCP) and SSDP (UDP) ports in the firewall. |
| `services.minidlna.package` | `package` | The minidlna package to use. |
| `services.minidlna.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a list of them for duplicate keys)` | Configuration for {manpage}`minidlna.conf(5)`. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.db_dir` | `absolute path` | Specify the directory to store database and album art cache. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.enable_subtitles` | `one of "yes", "no"` | Enable subtitle support on unknown clients. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.enable_tivo` | `one of "yes", "no"` | Support for streaming .jpg and .mp3 files to a TiVo supporting HMO. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.friendly_name` | `string` | Name that the server presents to clients. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.inotify` | `one of "yes", "no"` | Whether to enable inotify monitoring to automatically discover new files. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.log_level` | `string` | Defines the type of messages that should be logged and down to which level of importance. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.media_dir` | `list of string` | Directories to be scanned for media files. The `A,` `V,` `P,` prefixes restrict a directory to audio, video or image files. The directories must be accessible to the `minidlna` user account. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.notify_interval` | `signed integer` | The interval between announces (in seconds). Instead of waiting for announces, you should set `openFirewall` option to use SSDP discovery. Lower values (e.g. 30 seconds) should be used if your network is blocking the SSDP multicast. Some relevant information can be found [here](https://sourceforge.net/p/minidlna/discussion/879957/thread/1389d197/). |
| `services.minidlna.settings.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number for HTTP traffic (descriptions, SOAP, media transfer). |
| `services.minidlna.settings.root_container` | `string` | Use a different container as the root of the directory tree presented to clients. |
| `services.minidlna.settings.wide_links` | `one of "yes", "no"` | Set this to yes to allow symlinks that point outside user-defined `media_dir`. |
